overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, futuristic Night City street. The scene transitions from a covered walkway under an elevated highway to open urban streets with neon signage, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a dense cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in red pants through a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking steadily ahead of the camera
pedestrian leaning against the wall near the digital billboard

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the walkway above
large illuminated advertisement showing the Delamain corporate logo and vehicle
thick structural column supporting the overhead highway
futuristic yellow and white automated vending kiosk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure in a covered walkway. Digital billboards line the left wall while concrete pillars support the overpass above. The wet pavement reflects the neon lighting as the camera follows a pedestrian through this sheltered urban corridor.

events.description: exits covered walkway under overpass into open urban intersection with visible sky
pedestrians with umbrellas cross the path from left to right at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through an open intersection while avoiding crossing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking across the path from left to right
futuristic orange sports car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall futuristic corporate tower with the Arasaka logo visible on the facade
massive holographic advertisement displaying Arasaka corporate branding
tall street lamp with glowing blue-green neon illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered walkway to an open urban intersection. The massive Arasaka skyscraper dominates the view ahead while pedestrians with umbrellas cross the wet pavement. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane street as the camera navigates through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with neon signage and moving traffic

events.description: slight adjustment to follow the sidewalk curve alongside moving traffic
futuristic sports cars pass by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk parallel to flowing traffic, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the same direction along the sidewalk
yellow futuristic sports car driving past on the wet street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy multi-lane street with the Arasaka building now prominent ahead. The sidewalk is populated with pedestrians while futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road. Neon street lights and digital billboards illuminate the overcast scene as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with metal barriers and scaffolding

events.description: enters construction zone with metal barriers and scaffolding on the left
construction barriers temporarily obscure the view of the street traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow construction zone while following a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking ahead through the construction area
construction worker standing near barriers smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: temporary metal fencing and concrete barriers blocking off the construction area
metal scaffolding structure with industrial platforms and safety netting
large yellow warning signs with black symbols mounted on the construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a construction zone with metal barriers and scaffolding narrowing the walkway. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing purple umbrella walks ahead while a construction worker stands near the barriers. The path continues under another overpass structure with industrial equipment and warning signage visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into the open, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic city before narrowing into an industrial construction zone. It begins under a massive elevated highway where digital billboards line a covered walkway and wet pavement reflects the overhead neon. As the camera moves forward, the shelter gives way to a wide urban intersection dominated by the towering Arasaka skyscraper, with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians with umbrellas navigating the rain-slicked streets. The scene then continues along this busy multi-lane thoroughfare, passing under the glow of digital signage and overcast skies. Finally, the open street shifts into a constrained construction area filled with metal barriers and scaffolding, following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella toward another overpass structure.
